judgeReasoning: The response covers all three required points: it explains group organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, and AGENTS.md grouping; it characterizes /llms-full.txt as the monolithic all-docs fallback not split by group; and it lists many valid optional fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor). However, it also invents some per-section bundle paths (/docs/llms-full/authoring.txt) which contradicts the rubric note that site mode no longer emits per-group full-context files — though it correctly states /llms-full.txt itself is not sharded.
